---
title: ""
toc: false
---

```{=html}
<div style="display:flex; justify-content:space-between; align-items:flex-end; flex-wrap:wrap; gap:1rem; margin-bottom:2.5rem; padding-bottom:1.5rem; border-bottom:2px solid #e2e8f0;">
  <div>
    <h1 style="margin:0; font-size:2.4rem;">Owen Heap</h1>
    <p style="margin:0.4rem 0 0; color:#64748b; font-size:1rem;">
      📍 Rexburg, ID &nbsp;·&nbsp;
      ✉️ <a href="mailto:owenheap03@gmail.com">owenheap03@gmail.com</a> &nbsp;·&nbsp;
      📞 +1 760 484 0515 &nbsp;·&nbsp;
      <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/owen-heap-574a572b6/" target="_blank">LinkedIn</a>
    </p>
  </div>
  <a href="assets/OwenHeap_Resume.pdf" download
     style="display:inline-block; padding:0.55rem 1.3rem; background:#1a3a5c; color:#fff;
            border-radius:6px; font-weight:600; font-size:0.875rem; text-decoration:none;
            transition:background 0.2s;"
     onmouseover="this.style.background='#2e86ab'"
     onmouseout="this.style.background='#1a3a5c'">
    ⬇ Download PDF
  </a>
</div>
```

## Summary

Data-driven problem solver skilled in SQL, data visualization, and clear communication. Strong at turning analysis into actionable insights and contributing to team results.

---

## Education

**B.S. in Data Science** · Brigham Young University – Idaho, Rexburg, ID
`January 2024 – Present`

- GPA: 3.9

---

## Technical Skills

| Area | Tools & Technologies |
|------|----------------------|
| Data Analysis & Statistics | Regression analysis, hypothesis testing, data validation |
| Data Visualization | Tableau, R, Python |
| Other | Excel, GitHub, SQL |

---

## Work Experience

**Video Team Operator** · Becklar, Rexburg, ID
`January 2026 – Present`

- Monitor live video feeds to identify unusual activity, safety concerns, and policy violations in real time
- Record data with clear summaries to support follow-up actions and reporting
- Communicate information to supervisors and on-site teams to ensure fast, coordinated responses

---

**Campus Life Team Member** · Brigham Young University-Idaho, Rexburg, ID
`April 2024 – September 2025`

- Coordinated and set up campus-wide events for students
- Gained experience in a fast-paced environment by quickly learning new processes and systems
- Communicated with customers, supervisors, and team members

---

**Front Desk Receptionist** · Mount Woodson Golf Club, Ramona, CA
`January 2021 – December 2021`

- Greeted and welcomed guests, providing a positive first impression
- Scheduled appointments and maintained an organized calendar for multiple staff members
- Provided administrative support including data entry and filing

---

## Soft Skills

```{=html}
<div class="skills-strip">
  <span class="skill-pill">Analytical problem solving</span>
  <span class="skill-pill">Attention to detail</span>
  <span class="skill-pill">Cross-functional collaboration</span>
  <span class="skill-pill">Written & verbal communication</span>
  <span class="skill-pill">Customer-focused mindset</span>
</div>
```
